CREATE TABLE sample_data (id INT, text_value STRING);
INSERT INTO sample_data VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!'), (2, 'Café'), (3, 'naïve'), (4, 'Привет'), (5, '€ sign');
SELECT id, asciify(text_value) AS ascii_value FROM sample_data WHERE id > 2;
SELECT id, asciify(CONCAT(text_value, ' is awesome!')) FROM sample_data WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, description STRING);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, 'Hello, world in French: Bonjour!'), (2, 'Star sign: ★');
SELECT sd.id, sd.text_value, ad.description, asciify(ad.description) AS ascii_description FROM sample_data sd JOIN additional_data ad ON sd.id = ad.id;
SELECT DISTINCT asciify(text_value) FROM sample_data WHERE text_value LIKE '%€%' OR text_value LIKE '%naïve%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sample_data WHERE asciify(text_value) = 'Cafe';
WITH ascii_data AS (SELECT id, asciify(text_value) AS ascii_text FROM sample_data) SELECT a.id, a.ascii_text FROM ascii_data a WHERE a.ascii_text IS NOT NULL;
